chinese: 還有進步的空間（餘地）嗎？

english: They fought with all their might.
chinese: 他們竭盡全力（力量）戰鬥。

english: They hid the treasure in a cave.
chinese: 他們把寶藏藏在山洞裡。

english: The drums are made of animal hides.
chinese: 這些鼓是用動物皮革製成的。

meaning: 成功/紅極一時的人事物
english: Her new song is a big hit.
chinese: 她的新歌非常受歡迎（大紅大紫）。

english: It suddenly hit me that I was late.
chinese: 我突然意識到我遲到了。

english: I saw it with my own eyes.
My goal is to study abroad.

chinese: 他踢進了一個精彩的球。

english: Someone is knocking at the door.
I heard a knock on the window.
chinese: 我聽到窗戶傳來敲擊聲。

english: Don't knock it until you try it.
chinese: 沒試過以前不要批評它。

english: The project failed for lack of funds.
chinese: 該計畫因缺乏資金而失敗。

english: He lacks the confidence to lead.
Please lay the book on the table.

chinese: 用外行人的話來說（通俗來說），這意味著...

english: Can you lift this heavy box?
chinese: 你能搬起這個重箱子嗎？

english: We took the lift to the 10th floor.
Can you give me a lift to the station?
chinese: 你能載我一程去車站嗎？

english: There is a speed limit here.

chinese: 維多利亞女王統治了 63 年。

english: As a rule, I get up at six.
chinese: 通常情況下，我六點起床。

english: I made a cake for his birthday.
chinese: 我為他的生日做了一個蛋糕。

english: She will make a great doctor.
chinese: 她會成為一名優秀的醫生。

english: He is a master of martial arts.
Do you mind if I smoke?
Mind the gap between the train and platform.
chinese: 請小心列車與月台間的空隙。

english: We are moving to a new office.

chinese: 這部電影深深打動了我。

english: You need a mountain pass to enter.
chinese: 你需要入山證才能進入。

english: The army moved through the mountain pass.

chinese: 你不可能取悅每一個人。

english: I'll print the document for you.
chinese: 我會為你列印這份文件。

english: We had a great time at the party.
chinese: 我們在派對上玩得很開心。

english: He belongs to the Liberal Party.

chinese: 雙方（當事人）都簽署了合約。
我喜歡玩填字遊戲（謎題）。
突如其來的變化讓我感到困惑。

english: I wonder why he is late.
chinese: 我想知道他為什麼遲到。

english: The Grand Canyon is a wonder of nature.
chinese: 大峽谷是大自然的奇觀。
這張照片捕捉到了她的笑容。

english: The meeting came to a close.
Did you see the fashion show?
There is no show of improvement.
The elephant used its trunk to eat.
The trunk of this oak is very thick.
Put your bags in the trunk.
chinese: 把你的行李放在後車廂。

english: I am pretty sure about it.

chinese: 陽光從窗戶灑進來（流瀉）。

english: The diamonds sparkled in the light.
chinese: 鑽石在光線下閃閃發光。

english: Her eyes have a bright sparkle.
chinese: 她的眼睛很有神采（閃爍）。

english: Use a stick to stir the fire.
Stick the label on the box.
We must stick to the plan.
He speared a piece of meat with a fork.
He usually falls asleep in class.
I love the colors in the fall.

chinese: 我們參觀了尼加拉瀑布。

english: The kids were splashing in the pool.
Her dress added a splash of color.
chinese: 她的裙子增添了一抹亮色。

english: A burst of applause followed the speech.
chinese: 演講後響起了一陣掌聲。

english: I have a secret to share with you.
He sold all his shares in the company.
chinese: 他賣掉了公司的所有股份。

english: It's your turn to wash the dishes.
There are five people in my family.
Lions belong to the cat family.
I go to school by train.
Look at that school of dolphins.
He belongs to a different school of thought.
chinese: 他屬於不同的思想學派。

english: I have ten years of experience.
The country is experiencing a crisis.
He is reading in his study.
Write your name on the paper.
He published a paper on physics.
chinese: 他發表了一篇關於物理的論文。

english: We decided to paper the bedroom.
chinese: 我們決定給臥室貼上壁紙。

english: They found shelter from the rain.
chinese: 他們找到了避雨的地方。

english: The trees sheltered us from the sun.
chinese: 樹木為我們遮擋了陽光。

english: They can peaches in the factory.
chinese: 他們在工廠裡把桃子裝成罐頭。

english: He got canned for his poor work.
chinese: 他因為工作表現差被開除了。

english: What was the cause of the fire?
The storm caused a lot of damage.
chinese: 這場風暴造成了很大的損害。

english: They are fighting for a noble cause.
chinese: 他們正在為一個高尚的理想而奮鬥。

english: We need to document the entire process.
chinese: 我們需要記錄整個過程。

english: He attempted to break the record.
This was his first attempt at cooking.
chinese: 這是他第一次嘗試下廚。

english: I need to pack my suitcase.
chinese: 我需要收拾我的行李箱。

english: A pack of wolves was howling.
I want to apply for this job.
The rule does not apply here.
chinese: 這項規則在這裡不適用。

english: Apply the cream to the wound.
Send in your application by Friday.
Price is a key factor in the decision.
chinese: 價格是決策的關鍵因素。

english: Remember to factor in the cost of shipping.
chinese: 記得要把運費納入考慮。

english: He manages a team of ten people.
chinese: 他管理一個十人的團隊。

english: I managed to finish the work on time.
chinese: 我設法準時完成了工作。
總成本（整體費用）是 100 美元。
我需要一個安靜的地方。

english: She placed the vase on the table.
He placed second in the race.
chinese: 他在比賽中獲得第二名。

english: I know the local area very well.
What is the area of the square?
chinese: 這個正方形的面積是多少？

english: Physics is not my area of expertise.
chinese: 物理不是我的專業領域。

english: She likes to wear high heels.
My brother works in a factory.
chinese: 我哥哥在一家工廠工作。

english: This is a famous work of art.
chinese: 這是一件著名的藝術作品。

english: There was a fold in the map.
He returned to the family fold.
chinese: 他回到了家族的圈子（歸隊）。

english: The dog is waggling its tail.
The students will go on a field trip next week.
He is an expert in the field of AI.
chinese: 他是 AI 領域的專家。
她應付了一些棘手的問題。
一場重大的變革即將到來。
我的主修（專業）是經濟學。

english: I majored in History at college.

chinese: 他已經成年了（達到法定年齡）。

english: It was just a minor mistake.
chinese: 那只是一個輕微的錯誤。

english: She has a minor in Psychology.
Minors are not allowed to drink.
Love and hate are two extremes.
We can see the whole city from this position.
chinese: 從這個位置可以看到整個城市。

english: He holds a high position in the firm.
What is your position on this issue?
chinese: 你對這個問題的立場是什麼？
他們在我的護照上蓋了章。

english: She stamped her foot in anger.
The design bears the stamp of genius.
chinese: 這個設計帶有天才的印記（特徵）。
